titles.title: The cross has said it all

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The cross has said it all The cross has said it all I can't deny what You have shown The cross speaks of a God of love There displayed for all to see Jesus Christ our only hope The message of the Father's heart Come my children, come on home

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: As high as the heavens are above the earth So high is the measure of Your great love As far as the east is from the west So far You've taken our sins from us

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The cross has said it all The cross has said it all I never recognized Your touch Until I met You at the cross We are fallen, dust to dust How could You do this for us? Son of God, shed precious blood Who can comprehend this love?

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: How high, how wide, how deep How high…
